title: fix: /video/models returns video-only list
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
`/video/models` was aliased to `/image/models` (#12164), returning the full 37-model image+video list. Now it returns only the 12 `category: "video"` models.

- `/video/models` → filters to `category === "video"` (mirrors the `/3d/models` pattern)
- `/image/models` → unchanged (still the full image+video list)
- Keeps #8995 fixed (still a real route, no fall-through to generation/401)
- Adds a test asserting the list is video-only

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

gist.headline: Strictly video
gist.blurb: The `/video/models` endpoint was getting a little overenthusiastic and showing image models too. We've fixed it so it only returns the models actually meant for video generation.
gist.summary: The `/video/models` endpoint now correctly filters and returns only the 12 video-specific models, rather than the combined list of 37 image and video models.
gist.impact: Developers querying `/video/models` will now receive an accurate, filtered list of video models without having to manually parse out the image models.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot organizing film reels or video tapes, separating them from still photos. A retro TV or monitor showing moving pictures.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot sorting retro VHS tapes and film reels into a lime green (#ecf874) box, separating them from still polaroid photos. A chunky retro TV monitor in the background displays a moving pixel landscape. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm and nostalgic.
